text:
5.10.27:
https://community.ui.com/releases/UniFi-Network-Controller-5-10-27/c80933a1-e240-4b54-9923-75a4e95142fd

Improvements
    Make encrypted cookie optional for the built-in Guest Portal.

5.10.26:
https://community.ui.com/releases/UniFi-Network-Controller-5-10-26/2bcd1137-a5f1-437b-ba5d-30f9be2049c1

Bugfixes
    Add missing translation key for SSH password in setup wizard.
    Fix NPE for Download device info.
    Fix switch port customization bug caused by missing migration in earlier releases.
